_doc: Case 1: climate change research query. S1/S2/S3 are the relevant high-quality sources; S4 is noise.
query: What are the main causes of climate change and their relative contributions?

_doc: Case 2: LLM token pricing query. S1/S3 are relevant; S2/S4 are noise or off-topic.
query: How does token pricing work for large language model APIs and what affects cost?
